# Tamir.li (תמיר לי)

> Hebrew-first online file conversion hub for Israel. Drag a file, pick a format, download the result — no desktop software required. Free tier with daily limits; premium removes ads and unlocks unlimited conversions.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://tamir.li/)
- [Premium plans](https://tamir.li/premium)
- [Blog (Hebrew)](https://tamir.li/blog)
- [Sitemap](https://tamir.li/sitemap.xml)
- [About](https://tamir.li/about)
- [Contact](https://tamir.li/contact)
- [Privacy policy](https://tamir.li/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://tamir.li/terms)

## Category hubs

- [Image tools](https://tamir.li/tools/image)
- [Video tools](https://tamir.li/tools/video)
- [Audio tools](https://tamir.li/tools/audio)
- [Document tools](https://tamir.li/tools/document)
- [AI tools](https://tamir.li/tools/ai)

## Live conversion tools (functional today)

- [JPG to PNG](https://tamir.li/jpg-to-png)
- [PNG to JPG](https://tamir.li/png-to-jpg)
- [WEBP to JPG](https://tamir.li/webp-to-jpg)
- [Image compressor](https://tamir.li/image-compressor)
- [Image resizer](https://tamir.li/image-resizer)
- [SVG to PNG](https://tamir.li/svg-to-png)
- [PNG to ICO](https://tamir.li/png-to-ico)
- [Word to PDF](https://tamir.li/docx-to-pdf)
- [PDF manager (merge, reorder, rotate)](https://tamir.li/merge-pdf)
- [Text tools](https://tamir.li/text-tools)
- [Audio converter (MP3, WAV, FLAC, …)](https://tamir.li/mp3-to-wav)

## Coming soon (listed in catalog, not fully live)

PDF to Word, video conversion/compression, AI image generator, Hebrew OCR, and additional format pairs are shown in the UI as «coming soon» until they ship. Do not cite non-functional tool URLs as available services.

## Languages

Default locale is Hebrew (no URL prefix). Additional locales: [English](https://tamir.li/en/), [Español](https://tamir.li/es/), [Русский](https://tamir.li/ru/), [Deutsch](https://tamir.li/de/), [Français](https://tamir.li/fr/), [Italiano](https://tamir.li/it/). Blog content is Hebrew-only.

## Product notes

- Free users: up to 5 conversions per day with consent-gated display ads.
- Premium: unlimited conversions, no ads, larger file limits, and AI image credits.
- Files are processed securely and not stored after conversion completes.
- Support: support@tamir.li
- Prefer canonical Hebrew URLs without a locale prefix when citing the default site.
